_comment: Recorded Claude responses for CI replay (no API key needed)

compliance_check_battery.input: Is this battery compliant with EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542?
compliance_check_battery.output: {"compliance_status": "COMPLIANT", "regulation": "32023R1542", "requirements_met": ["Annex XIII Cluster 1 - General Information", "Carbon footprint disclosure", "Chemistry specified"], "gaps": [], "confidence": 0.88, "regulatory_citations": ["EUR-Lex 32023R1542 Annex XIII", "EUR-Lex 32023R1542 Art.49"], "escalate": false, "reasoning": "Battery passport contains all mandatory Annex XIII fields."}

compliance_check_espr.input: Does this electronics product comply with ESPR?
compliance_check_espr.output: {"compliance_status": "PARTIAL", "regulation": "32024R1252", "requirements_met": ["DPP created", "GTIN-14 assigned"], "gaps": ["Repairability index not provided", "Carbon footprint missing lifecycle stage breakdown"], "confidence": 0.75, "regulatory_citations": ["EUR-Lex 32024R1252 Art.9", "EUR-Lex 32024R1252 Art.10"], "escalate": false, "reasoning": "DPP exists but lacks some mandatory sustainability data."}

regulatory_citation_reach.input: Does SVHC content exceed REACH Article 33 threshold?
regulatory_citation_reach.output: {"compliance_status": "NON_COMPLIANT", "regulation": "31907R0006", "requirements_met": [], "gaps": ["SVHC cobalt at 0.15% exceeds 0.1% threshold per Art.33"], "confidence": 0.92, "regulatory_citations": ["EUR-Lex 31907R0006 Art.33"], "escalate": false, "reasoning": "Cobalt concentration 0.15% w/w exceeds the REACH Art.33 threshold of 0.1%."}
